title: Section 46
content: (1) When a casual vacancy occurs in the office of a member of the Standing Committee, 1[Corporation or, as the case may be, Wards Committee shall] fill up the vacancy, as soon as may be after, and in any case within one month of, the occurrence of the vacancy, by the election of another councillor or 2[persons referred to in sub-clause (i) of clause (b) of sub-section (3)] of section 3.] (2) A member elected to fill a casual vacancy shall be elected to serve for the remainder of his predecessor's term of office
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 40, ibid., for "Corporation shall" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 2. Subs. by s. 40, ibid., for "alderman" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
